context: You expect to pay your loan in the next upcoming month and you have started planning ahead, yet you hope someone can just give you 25 000$ to forget about it.

conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt most connected to J because we quickly formed a tight three-person alliance with clear signals and coordinated roles, which made me comfortable relying on them in the moment. I also felt very aligned with G — we shared a low-profile approach, explicit minimum split thresholds, and a discreet nod signal, which felt like a pragmatic match for my goals. C was warm and supportive and I appreciated that, but of the three I felt least connected to C because our conversations were more general and lacked the concrete tactical plans that J and G offered.

Yes — I made specific agreements: with J to form a three-person alliance (bringing K in) using two quick taps as our signal, and with G to only accept splits that net at least $25k for me and $20k for them, using a discreet nod. I trust J and G strategically based on those concrete plans, and I’m less certain about C’s tactical reliability despite liking them personally.
